mapper.select: SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT INQUIRY_ID , 'INQ-' || EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) || '-' || LPAD(INQUIRY_ID, 4, '0') AS INQUIRY_CODE , TITLE , CASE WHEN ANSWERED_AT IS NULL THEN '요청' WHEN ANSWERED_AT IS NOT NULL THEN '답변 완료' END AS STATUS , I.CREATED_AT , STORE_NAME , STORE_ID FROM INQUIRIES I JOIN STORES S USING ( STORE_ID ) WHERE I.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY I.CREATED_AT DESC , INQUIRY_ID DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= #{count}
